'''Corpo''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] who lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] during the last [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], Corpo lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] in the last decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Corpo cared about few things, chiefly [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] and [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]]. His prize possession was a [[MREM-02]] kitchen [[Droid/Legends|droid]]. At some point, the famous chef [[Slabba Drewl]] lost a bet to Corpo, and in turn the Hutt had him [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]]. Some time prior to [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]] and [[Micah Giiett]] were dispatched from the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] to rescue the chef.

Upon arrival, Giiett bet Corpo that he would be able to prepare a meal for the Hutt even better than one made by his MREM-02 droid. Corpo was confident in his droid's abilities, and took the wager; if Giett succeeded, Drewl would be freed, but if he failed, he too would be enslaved. Giiett, however, had no intention of failing, and instructed Koon to sabotage MREM-02's dishes. The cook-off began, and the theme ingredient was announced: [[Denusian squirmer]]s. Though he was attacked by the still-living ingredient, Giiett used his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] to both chop and cook the squirmers. In turn, Koon replaced MREM-02's [[seebo sauce]] with droid [[Oil/Legends|oil]], and managed to slip [[Gundark/Legends|gundark]] droppings, [[Rakririan Burnout Sauce]] and [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] foot powder into the droid's pot.

At the end of the cook-off, MREM-02 presented Corpo with five complete dishes of well-made food, while Giiett presented two sloppy bowls of squirmer stew. Still confident, Corpo tasted MREM-02's sabotaged meal, only to find it disgusting. Honoring his bet, Corpo immediately released Drewl from his custody. Enraged by his loss, he physically attacked MREM-02, which caused the large droid to topple over onto the Hutt.

==Behind the scenes==
While Corpo only appeared in the ambiguously-canon [[Star Wars Tales]], Denusian squirmers and the planet of [[Denusia system/Legends|Denusia]] were later referenced in, respectively, [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 128]] and ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''.
